title: neltuma rubriflora
intro: Neltuma rubriflora, also known as Red-flowered Neltuma, is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, roots, and flowers, which are used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Neltuma rubriflora include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which provide several health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
